title: SEPOX® Heavy Duty Padlock Keyed Alike, 40MM 1-9/16" Laminated Steel Lock Body, 2-3/8" Extra Long Shackle, Ideal for Gym Locker, Sheds, Gate, Warehouse, Hasp (2 Same Keys)
features: 🛡️Superior Material: SEPOX padlocks are constructed with a steel body and zinc plated for maximum durability and robustness, which ensure better resistance to corrosion and weather effects.
🗝️Paired Keys: Each pair of padlocks come with identical keys, this eliminates the worry about losing one key as you have a backup.
🔒Steel & Zinc-Plated Body: The solid construction of our padlocks ensures the utmost security. They are made with steel and coated with zinc for improved strength and extended lifespan.

🌦️Weather-Resistant: Designed to endure harsh weather conditions, our padlocks are ideal for outdoor use. Thanks to their superior material and coating, they promise longevity and reliable performance.
👍User-friendly Design: SEPOX padlocks are convenient and easy to use. We take user experience into consideration and thus, design our products to provide ease and simplicity in usage.
description: Product Description SEPOX Padlock Padlock Ideal for gym lockers, suitcases, baggage, home, garden shed, gate security etc SEPOX is a professional manufacturer and exporter of Hardware›Padlocks & Hasps. Till 2010 year, SEPOX has invested in 3 factories,specialized in different kinds padlocks and cylinder; also as a trader for other home hardware such as hinge/door viewer/hooks etc. Starting from 2013 year, SEPOX is seeking innovation and developing new durable material padlocks, 100% factory made and patent product, exclusively design. Chrome steel shackle hardened Hardened shackle Slip the saw 6MM Diameter Thicken the lock body Thickened lock body Angle grinding, Effective resistance to violence Copper lock cylinder Copper is not easy to rust Brass is corrosion-resistant in the atmosphere, and the residual waste is easy to recycle and remelt SEPOX Long Shackle Padlocks with Same Key 40MM 4 Pack 4 long shackle padlock 8 keys intotal Key same 8 opportunities to lose your keys 2 keys per lock 1 key to open all padlocks They are all keyed alike padlock Sturdy and Durable padlock Laminated steel lock body Hardened long shackle Brass lock cylinder Heavy Duty Padlock with Key Anti-Knock Anti-Saw Anti-Pry Twins Heavy Duty Padlock Keyed Alike 40MM Different Keys Padlock Weatherproof Outdoor Padlock Keyed Alike Outdoor Keyed Padlock Outdoor Keyed Padlock Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 686 4.5 out of 5 stars 686 4.2 out of 5 stars 420 4.1 out of 5 stars 793 4.1 out of 5 stars 793 Price £9.99 £ 9 . 99 £17.99 £ 17 . 99 £15.99 £ 15 . 99 £29.49 £ 29 . 49 £29.49 £ 29 . 49 Widely Used Lockers Door Warehouse Home Tool cabinet
